defect: lock without tag / tag without lock
prompt: Evaluate the procedure sequence and state what must happen before work can continue.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is Lockout/Tagout, part of the Safety & Rigging scope. The observed field condition is: lock without tag / tag without lock. The work is actively in progress. Reference material on hand: OSHA 1910.147.
title: Sequence check: Lockout/Tagout (service call)
